data.title: Loman AI secures $3.5M funding to enhance restaurant operations using Voice AI, leading to 22% revenue growth.
data.description: An Austin-based startup focused on voice AI technology, Loman, has successfully secured a $3.5 million seed funding round. The company achieved this milestone after handling a large volume of restaurant calls across the nation. Through their innovative technology, Loman was able to help restaurant operators increase their revenue by an impressive 22%.
Nordic Fibreboard AS released unaudited Q2 2025 interim report.
Air France-KLM issues 500 million euros notes under EMTN Programme at attractive pricing, proving successful.

data.title: The dollar's brief July comeback is fading due to stagflation fears, with a 1% drop in August. Bank of America predicts further decline. Fed may cut rates due to weak job data and high inflation. Fed leaning dovish may lead to further dollar depreciation.
data.description: The dollar briefly rebounded in July with a 3% increase after a poor first half, but has since dropped over 1% by August 21, leading to concerns about stagflation. Stagflation fears have resurfaced due to weakening labor data and high inflation, as the U.S. Dollar Index is on a downtrend. Bank of America predicts a quick decline for the dollar, as the Federal Reserve might cut rates amidst rising inflation. Stagflation, a mix of weak growth and increasing prices, historically harms the dollar, particularly when the Fed pursues a dovish approach. This situation could lead to a further depreciation of the dollar.

data.title: Global Vitamin D Therapy Market to grow from USD 2.64 Bn in 2025 to USD 5.62 Bn by 2032, with a CAGR of 11.3%. Market driven by rising awareness of vitamin D deficiency, increasing demand across age groups and regions. Over-the-counter drugs account for 58.2% of the market share in 2025. North America dominates the market, with Asia Pacific expected to become a lucrative region.
data.description: The Global Vitamin D Therapy Market is currently valued at USD 2.64 Bn and expected to reach USD 5.62 Bn by 2032, showing a CAGR of 11.3% from 2025 to 2032. Factors driving growth include increased awareness of vitamin D deficiency and related health disorders, as well as advancements in therapy options. The market is experiencing trends like personalized medicine, digital health tools, and innovative formulations to enhance bioavailability. Over-the-counter drugs hold a significant market share, and the oral route of administration dominates. North America leads the market, with Asia Pacific expected to see substantial growth. The rising incidence of vitamin D deficiency is fueling market expansion, but there are challenges such as the risk of overdose and the use of alternative nutrient sources impacting growth.

data.title: Gambling.com Group reveals 60 finalists in 12 categories for 2025 American Gambling Awards, judged by industry experts.
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina - Gambling.com Group Limited (Nasdaq: GAMB) revealed the list of over 60 finalists in 12 different categories for the upcoming 2025 American Gambling Awards. These nominations will be reviewed by esteemed judges within the industry, specializing in the United States market. The company is recognized for its rapid expansion in delivering marketing and sports data services for the global online gambling sector.

data.title: Navy Federal CU introduces Grad Student Loan for advanced degrees, with competitive rates, tailored for master’s, doctoral, medical, law programs.
data.description: A financial institution based in Vienna, Virginia, has launched a new Graduate Student Loan aimed at supporting members seeking advanced degrees. The program offers competitive rates and flexible terms catering to students pursuing master's, doctoral, medical, law, and other professional programs. This initiative underscores the institution's dedication to assisting members in achieving their educational aspirations. The Graduate Student Loan from Navy Federal Credit Union exemplifies their commitment to supporting higher education and academic pursuits.

data.title: Palantir stock maintains above 50-day line, defies AI concerns. PLTR stock seen as buy due to strong U.S. govt business.
data.description: Supporters of Palantir are emphasizing the company's artificial intelligence strategy and robust business with the U.S. government despite its high valuation in the stock market. Palantir's stock has remained above its 50-day moving average, defying concerns about its AI software. Many are questioning if investing in PLTR stock is advisable given these factors.

data.title: Commerce Dept. integrates GDP data on Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana blockchains, partnering with Chainlink and Pyth for DeFi.
data.description: The U.S. federal government has partnered with Chainlink and Pyth to integrate macroeconomic data into the DeFi ecosystem. This collaboration aims to enhance the visibility and utilization of important economic indicators within decentralized finance.
